mapper.select: SELECT rt.room_type_id, rt.accommodation_id, rt.name AS room_type_name FROM room_types rt JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = rt.accommodation_id WHERE rt.room_type_id = #{roomTypeId} AND rt.status = 'ACTIVE' AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' FOR UPDATE
SELECT r.room_id FROM rooms r WHERE r.room_type_id = #{roomTypeId} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.room_id FOR UPDATE

SELECT r.room_id, r.accommodation_id, r.room_code, r.room_type_id, rt.name AS room_type_name FROM rooms r JOIN room_types rt ON rt.room_type_id = r.room_type_id JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = r.accommodation_id WHERE r.accommodation_id = #{accommodationId} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND rt.status = 'ACTIVE' AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.room_type_id, r.room_id FOR UPDATE

SELECT rb.room_id, rb.start_date, rb.end_date FROM room_blocks rb JOIN rooms r ON r.room_id = rb.room_id WHERE r.room_type_id = #{roomTypeId} AND rb.status = 'ACTIVE' AND rb.start_date < #{checkOutDate} AND rb.end_date >= #{checkInDate} ORDER BY rb.room_id, rb.start_date, rb.end_date FOR UPDATE

SELECT rb.room_id, rb.start_date, rb.end_date FROM room_blocks rb JOIN rooms r ON r.room_id = rb.room_id WHERE r.accommodation_id = #{accommodationId} AND rb.status = 'ACTIVE' AND rb.start_date < #{checkOutDate} AND rb.end_date >= #{checkInDate} ORDER BY rb.room_id, rb.start_date, rb.end_date FOR UPDATE

SELECT rn.assigned_room_id AS room_id, rn.stay_date FROM reservation_nights rn JOIN reservations rv ON rv.reservation_id = rn.reservation_id JOIN rooms r ON r.room_id = rn.assigned_room_id WHERE r.room_type_id = #{roomTypeId} AND rn.stay_date >= #{checkInDate} AND rn.stay_date < #{checkOutDate} AND rv.status IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED') ORDER BY rn.stay_date, rn.assigned_room_id FOR UPDATE

SELECT rn.assigned_room_id AS room_id, rn.stay_date FROM reservation_nights rn JOIN reservations rv ON rv.reservation_id = rn.reservation_id JOIN rooms r ON r.room_id = rn.assigned_room_id WHERE r.accommodation_id = #{accommodationId} AND rn.stay_date >= #{checkInDate} AND rn.stay_date < #{checkOutDate} AND rv.status IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED') ORDER BY rn.stay_date, rn.assigned_room_id FOR UPDATE
